lines.raw: Do they speak English? | 他们说英语吗？

lines.english: Why does the writer not understand the porter?
lines.chinese: 为什么作者听不懂搬运工的话？
lines.raw: Why does the writer not understand the porter? | 为什么作者听不懂搬运工的话？

lines.english: I arrived in London at last.
lines.raw: I arrived in London at last. | 我终于抵达伦敦了。

lines.english: The railway station was big, black and dark.
lines.raw: The railway station was big, black and dark. | 火车站又大，又黑，又暗。

lines.english: I did not know the way to my hotel, so I asked a porter.
lines.chinese: 我不知道去旅馆的路，所以我问了一位搬运工。
lines.raw: I did not know the way to my hotel, so I asked a porter. | 我不知道去旅馆的路，所以我问了一位搬运工。

lines.english: I not only spoke English very carefully, but very clearly as well.
lines.chinese: 我不仅非常仔细地说英语，而且说得非常清楚。
lines.raw: I not only spoke English very carefully, but very clearly as well. | 我不仅非常仔细地说英语，而且说得非常清楚。

lines.english: The porter, however, could not understand me.
lines.chinese: 然而，那个搬运工却听不懂我。
lines.raw: The porter, however, could not understand me. | 然而，那个搬运工却听不懂我。

lines.english: I repeated my question several times and at last he understood.
lines.chinese: 我重复了我的问题好几次，最后他终于明白了。
lines.raw: I repeated my question several times and at last he understood. | 我重复了我的问题好几次，最后他终于明白了。

lines.english: he answered me, but he spoke neither slowly nor clearly.
lines.chinese: 他回答了我，但他既说得不慢也不清楚。
lines.raw: he answered me, but he spoke neither slowly nor clearly. | 他回答了我，但他既说得不慢也不清楚。
'I am a foreigner,' I said. | “我是一个外国人，”我说。

lines.english: Then he spoke slowly, but I could not understand him.
lines.chinese: 然后他慢慢地说，但我仍然听不懂他。
lines.raw: Then he spoke slowly, but I could not understand him. | 然后他慢慢地说，但我仍然听不懂他。

lines.english: My teacher never spoke English like that!
lines.chinese: 我的老师从来没有那样说过英语！
lines.raw: My teacher never spoke English like that! | 我的老师从来没有那样说过英语！

lines.english: The porter and I looked at each other and smiled.
lines.chinese: 搬运工和我互相对视，然后笑了。
lines.raw: The porter and I looked at each other and smiled. | 搬运工和我互相对视，然后笑了。

lines.english: Then he said something and I understood it.
lines.chinese: 然后他说了一些话，我听懂了。
lines.raw: Then he said something and I understood it. | 然后他说了一些话，我听懂了。

lines.chinese: “你很快就会学好英语的！”他说。
lines.raw: 'You'll soon learn English!' he said. | “你很快就会学好英语的！”他说。

lines.english: In England, each person speaks a different language.
lines.chinese: 在英国，每个人都说着不同的语言。
lines.raw: In England, each person speaks a different language. | 在英国，每个人都说着不同的语言。

lines.english: The English understand each other, but I don't understand them!
lines.chinese: 英国人彼此听得懂，但我听不懂他们！
lines.raw: The English understand each other, but I don't understand them! | 英国人彼此听得懂，但我听不懂他们！
